Alex was beyond speech, but he managed to spell out NO into her palm. She held his wrist, willing the pulse to continue, yet she could feel his fingers still fluttering weakly as he tried to communicate.

Then the fingers were quiet, and he was gone. Mabel bowed her head as she took in the enormity of her loss. The man around whom her whole life had revolved since she was 17 was no longer there.
